message.content:
@startuml
title 七並べシーケンス図（一周）ver.3
participant "App" as App
participant "Game" as Game
participant "Player" as Player
participant "View" as View
participant "TableView" as TableView
participant "PlayersListView" as PlayersListView

App -> Game: startRound()
activate Game
Game -> Player: startTurn()
activate Player
== ターン進行 ==
Game -> Player: [playersList.inPlayを回す]
== ターン終了 ==
Game -> View: render(playersList,table)
activate View
View -> TableView: render(table)
View -> PlayersListView: render(playersList)
deactivate View
Game -> Game: cleanUpPlayersList()
App -> Game: isEnd()
activate Game
Game --> App: boolean
deactivate Game
alt [true]
    App -> Game: endGame()
else [false]
    App -> Game: startRound()
end
@enduml
